rows.label: qev080404_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mother, I bought the weapons,
but... where are our comrades?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0002
rows.name:
Even if you tell me you'll make
me the boss in a place with nobody
around, I'm not happy at all?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0003
rows.name: Eei! Shush! Who do you think I am?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0004
rows.name:
I am Fortun-sama, who presides over the knowledge
of the galaxy, you know? My daughters, worried
about me, should be gathering here shortly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0005
rows.name:
Then we shall launch an all-out attack
on NLA with the weapons we've amassed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0006
rows.name:
Fufu. I'll show Erio, who made a fool
out of me, and [ST:playername ] exactly what...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0007
rows.name: This is... Why?! Why are you here?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev080404_SEL0011
rows.name: State that you came looking for the vanished Fortun.

rows.label: qev080404_JNK0020
rows.name: Get Angry

rows.label: qev080404_SEL0021
rows.name: Furiously declare that you will thwart Fortun's ambitions.

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0008
rows.name:
How very kind of you. But I
am merely here on vacation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0009
rows.name:
You have no need to worry,
so please, return to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0010
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Now, Lyvia! Strike them down
while they're off guard! Someone
like them is no match for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0012
rows.name:
Eek... Even if you act all angry
like that... I-I'm not scared![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0013
rows.name:
Now, Lyvia, finish them off! Someone
like them is no match for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0014
rows.name:
No, that's ab... absolutely impossible,
right?! Someone like me could never...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0015
rows.name:
Eei! If you win this fight, I shall even
yield the seat of NLA's ruler to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0016
rows.name:
Now, go! If you don't go, I will
have to revoke the talk of making
you the King of the Definias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0017
rows.name:
No way...! Ugh, fine! If it's come
to this, I'm going all outttt![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0018
rows.name: S... Stooop![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0019
rows.name:
You see, I was just gathering weapons
because Mother told me she'd make me
the boss of the Definia corps![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0020
rows.name:
So I don't care at all about
ruling NLA, and I have no
intention of harming you guys![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0021
rows.name:
Lyvia! Are you still my daughter? Fight
on until your life is extinguished![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0022
rows.name:
Kill them! Kill [ST:playername ]! And then
together, we shall conquer NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0023
rows.name:
No! Besides, it seems none of the
other Definia girls have any intention
of returning to you, Mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0024
rows.name:
Even Definias these days want to work under
proper working conditions, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Right? So, will you forgive
me? I'm cutting ties with Mother
right here and now, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_JNK0030
rows.name: Forgive

rows.label: qev080404_SEL0031
rows.name: Forgive Lyvia.

rows.label: qev080404_JNK0040
rows.name: Don't Forgive

rows.label: qev080404_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not forgive Lyvia's crimes.

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ah, thank you! What a
kind person you are![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0027
rows.name:
I would have much rather worked
under someone like you than Mother![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0028
rows.name:
Well then, goodbye! You can boil or roast
Mother, do whatever you like with her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0029
rows.name:
If that's the case... I'll pull
through with my ultimate technique![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0030
rows.name:
Flee! At top speed! I'll absolutely never
do it again, so please forgive me~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0031
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0032
rows.name:
...My, my. It's quite impressive
that you came all this way just
to pick me up, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0033
rows.name:
Thank you for your hard work.
Now, let us return together
to our soul's hometown—NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_JNK0050
rows.name: Destroy

rows.label: qev080404_SEL0051
rows.name: Scrap Fortun.

rows.label: qev080404_JNK0060
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev080404_SEL0061
rows.name: Follow Fortun's words and quietly return to NLA.

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0034
rows.name:
Wa-wait! Please wait a moment!
This was just a little joke.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0035
rows.name:
See? Luxaar has fallen, and you
must have been bored, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0036
rows.name:
That's why I used my intellect
to try and provide you with
a little stimulation...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Wait, ah! Stop...!
Gyaaaaaaaaaaaaaagh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0038
rows.name:
...I understand the feeling, but
hold back. Even someone like
this is, for now, my mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0039
rows.name:
Besides, as we've learned from this incident, she no longer
has the power to manipulate my sisters or any popularity.
Even if she lives, she won't be able to do anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0040
rows.name:
It is good that even within you, there
exists the slightest bit of intellect
that desires a peaceful resolution.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0041
rows.name:
Now then, let us return! To
that cesspool of a city—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0042
rows.name:
...As I thought, no matter how
much you tweak her personality,
this one is beyond saving.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0043
rows.name:
It's truly pathetic... No wonder she
lost the popularity of the sisters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0044
rows.name:
R-rude! Erio, just who
do you think I am?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0045
rows.name:
Just a nagging lump of metal, right? And
the worst part is, you're my mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0046
rows.name:
...You've helped me out again.
I'll take responsibility and
punish this one myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080404_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'll take her and head back
to NLA first. Come see me
when you get back, alright?[ST:wait ]
